description: VDH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Virginia.
citation: 12 VAC 5-410 / Virginia Department of Health Hospital Regulations

description: VDH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed room minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
VDH: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
VDH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
VDH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101.
VDH: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
VDH: New hospital and outpatient surgery center construction requires Certificate of Public Need (COPN) from VDH prior to construction. Virginia is a COPN state.
citation: Virginia Code §32.1-102 — Certificate of Public Need

description: VDH: All licensed hospital plans must be reviewed and approved by VDH Office of Licensure and Certification prior to construction start.
